skills.name: specify
skills.description: Spec-driven development — reverse-engineer behavioral specs from code, scaffold code from specs, verify code↔spec conformance, and reflect on a spec before coding. A spec is "a codebase without the code": README + trigger-keyed files describing WHAT a system does, never HOW. Use when writing/validating behavioral specs, generating a spec from existing code, building code from a spec, or checking that code still matches its spec.
